allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''Description:'''', d.get\(''''description'''',''''''''\)\); print\(''''Language:'''', d.get\(''''language'''',''''''''\)\); print\(''''Stars:'''', d.get\(''''stargazers_count'''',''''''''\)\); print\(''''Created:'''', d.get\(''''created_at'''',''''''''\)\); print\(''''Updated:'''', d.get\(''''pushed_at'''',''''''''\)\); print\(''''Default branch:'''', d.get\(''''default_branch'''',''''''''\)\)")
